import React, { useState,useContext } from 'react' import { Link, useHistory } from "react-router-dom"; import { Navbar } from './Navbar'; import SweetAlertContext from "./context/SweetAlertContext"; export const Signup = (props) => { const {Register} = useContext(SweetAlertContext); const [credentials, setCredentials] = useState({ email: "", password: "", username: "", confirmpassword: "" }) let history = useHistory() const handleSubmit = async (e) => { e.preventDefault(); const { username, email, password } = credentials; const url = `http://localhost:5000/api/auth/signin` const response = await fetch(url, { method: "POST", headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json', }, body: JSON.stringify({ email, password, username }) }); const json = await response.json(); console.log(json); if (json.success) { //Save the Auth Token & Redirect localStorage.setItem('token', json.authToken); props.showAlert("Register in successfully","success") history.push('/login'); } else { props.showAlert("Registration failed please try again","Danger") } } const onChange = (e) => { setCredentials({ ...credentials, [e.target.name]: e.target.value }) } return ( <>
